name: ADOBE INC.
summary: Adobe Inc. builds innovative platforms and tools for creativity, productivity, and personalized customer experiences. Key products include Acrobat, Photoshop, Adobe Firefly, Adobe GenStudio, and Adobe Experience Platform. Adobe serves business professionals, consumers, creators, creative professionals, and marketing professionals with AI-powered solutions spanning document productivity, creative content creation, and digital marketing experience orchestration across desktop, web, and mobile.
